availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ROSEMARY EXTRACT INFUSION: Enriched with rosemary extract to invigorate hair from root to tip. Adds freshness to the scalp and supports natural shine. Great after long days, workouts, or time in the sun
SOOTHES DRY SCALPS: Helps relieve discomfort caused by dryness or flaking. Ideal for cooler seasons or after using styling products. Massage in to calm irritation and leave scalp feeling comforted
DAILY USE FORMULA: Designed to be gentle enough for everyday conditioning. Won’t weigh hair down or cause build-up. Perfect for busy mornings or after gym showers

HYDRATES WITH ALOE VERA: Formulated with aloe vera to moisturise and soften each strand. Perfect after heat styling, colouring or daily exposure to the elements. Leaves hair with a smooth, silky finish
NOURISHING PROTEIN BOOST: Contains proteins to help strengthen hair and improve texture. Ideal for fine, limp or dull hair that needs extra care. Use regularly to help reduce breakage over time
LEAVES HAIR MANAGEABLE: Leaves hair soft, detangled and easy to style. Whether air-drying or blow-drying, hair feels more controlled and less prone to knots. Ideal for all hair lengths
description: Product Description Give hair the care it deserves with Nuage Rosemary Conditioner – a gentle, daily-use formula designed to nourish, condition and restore. Infused with revitalising rosemary extract, soothing aloe vera, and hair-loving proteins, this conditioner helps to soften and smooth the hair while calming dry or irritated scalps. Whether used as part of a complete shampoo and conditioner set, or as a solo solution for tired tresses, it leaves hair feeling healthy, hydrated and manageable. Perfect for all hair types and ideal for everyday use, it offers a natural-feeling cleanse that won’t strip or weigh hair down. The fresh rosemary scent adds a refreshing touch to your daily routine, while the 400ml size is ideal for at-home use or decanting into travel-sized containers. For best results, pair with Nuage Rosemary Shampoo and Hair & Scalp Oil to complete your botanical haircare ritual. Ingredients Aqua, Polyquaternium-37, Propylene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, Phenoxyethanol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Alo Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice, Trideceth-6, Silicone Quaternium-17, C11-15 Isoalkanes, Ethylhexylglycerin, Trideceth-12, Glycerine, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Extract, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid. Directions After shampooing, apply a generous amount to hair, massage into hair, leave for a few minutes, then rinse out. Use as needed, but not more than once a day. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
